name: RoachNet
subtitle: RoachNetiOS installs for SideStore
description: RoachNetiOS keeps RoachClaw, vault reads, runtime checks, and install handoff close on iPhone and iPad.

apps.name: RoachNetiOS
apps.subtitle: RoachClaw in your pocket
apps.localizedDescription: RoachNetiOS keeps chat, runtime reads, vault shelf access, and install handoff close. Pair to your desktop over RoachTail, or fall back to the offline-capable local lane when the bridge is down.

versions.localizedDescription: Adds the v1.0.4 companion contract, refreshed desktop pairing checks, stronger vault/runtime reads, and the unsigned SideStore IPA lane.

privacy.NSCameraUsageDescription: RoachNetiOS uses the camera to scan RoachTail pairing QR codes from your Mac.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: RoachNet iOS connects to your Mac companion runtime so you can keep using chats, vault data, and installs from your phone.
